expected_path_note: exclusion_check=Yes (privately owned, privately financed infrastructure) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 11 – Private Shopping Mall Developer Egypt
activities: Karim El-Sayed develops and owns shopping malls and a private leisure complex around Cairo. The projects are financed by his family holding and commercial bank loans; the malls are privately owned and operated for rental income. His file records no contracts with any government body — the developments are on privately acquired land for private commercial use, open to the public as customers.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Mall properties held through the family holding.
